content:
## Eligibility Checks
Before opening a Northstar Bank business checking deposit account, confirm that every condition in business_registered, authorized_signer_has_authority, initial_deposit_at_or_above_product_minimum, no_unresolved_negative_balance_flag is satisfied for the business and authorized signer. Treat any missing item as incomplete eligibility; do not open the account until the record supports the condition or the customer provides the needed information.

1. Confirm the business is registered.
2. Confirm the authorized signer has authority for the business.
3. Confirm the initial deposit meets or exceeds the product minimum for the selected business checking account.
4. Confirm there is no unresolved negative balance flag.

See "Business Checking Product Comparison" for product selection details before choosing the account class.

## Opening Action
Business deposit accounts are opened only through the documented opening tool template open_business_deposit_account_{suffix}. The tool is a WRITE action and requires unlock status True before use.

Required arguments are user_id, business_id, account_class, initial_deposit, authorized_signer_name. Match the account_class to the selected business checking product, enter the initial_deposit exactly as confirmed, and use the authorized_signer_name for the person whose authority was verified.

## Incomplete or Conflicting Information
If the customer has not provided a required value, ask a focused follow-up before proceeding. If the business registration, signer authority, product-minimum deposit, or negative-balance check conflicts with the customer request, explain the blocking condition and the next information needed. For fee questions after opening eligibility is confirmed, direct staff to "Business Checking Fee Waiver Policy" rather than adding fee guidance here.
title: Internal: Business Account Opening Eligibility
